content:
https://www.cubistheart.com/
https://github.com/yrdnal-c-nhoj/CHL
I am using a central JSON file to define the list of clocks (and tags), which are then loaded into a global React Context, hosted on GitHub and deployed on Vercel.
*I feel sometimes like the homepage and the list page are redundant. Would it make sense for me to combine them? How can I organize this information efficiently?
* Are the thumbnails too small? Is it too crowded?
*Should I be limiting the use of tags? Sometimes I want to use them to explain what's going on, almost like a punch line. Is it annoying to have lots of them and just use most of them once?
*How can I make this more interesting for people? I'm thinking about a page with a series of curated lists?
*Are there resources out there that can evaluate my site and my code and its delivery?
*Any other ideas on how I can improve this project?
All feedback is greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance.

  submitted by   /u/Negative_Ad2438
[link]   [comments]
